phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q the wave and collect the dagger — every pickup is a free spin; the lane learns your dagger geometry or bleeds.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: W joins: drop, dance, collect — the self-dagger speeds your trades and your exits both.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Full kit: E to daggers, not faces — the blink economy is the champion; trade only through steel on the ground.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Dagger-trade on cooldown: Q-E-W-E strings chunk and the resets... wait for kills. Bank the patterns.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Death Lotus online — any 2v2 near your daggers is a blender invoice. The reset engine is armed.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: First item spike: full dagger strings delete squishies and one kill opens the chain reaction.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Kata is a chain reaction: enter on daggers, lotus the clump, reset through the wreckage, repeat until silence.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q the wave and collect the dagger — every pickup is a free spin; the lane learns your dagger geometry or bleeds.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: W joins: drop, dance, collect — the self-dagger speeds your trades and your exits both.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Full kit: E to daggers, not faces — the blink economy is the champion; trade only through steel on the ground.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Through levels 4-5 your dagger-reset roulettes beat the stardust ramp control in a straight exchange. Play the front foot — make Aurelion Sol answer you, not the other way around.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Death Lotus online — any 2v2 near your daggers is a blender invoice. The reset engine is armed.

phases.label: First item

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Kata is a chain reaction: enter on daggers, lotus the clump, reset through the wreckage, repeat until silence.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q the wave and collect the dagger — every pickup is a free spin; the lane learns your dagger geometry or bleeds.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: Slight edge at level 2: your dagger-reset roulettes beat Azir's soldier-poke shuffle control on the margins. Take the short trades you start — just don't force a coin-flip all-in off a small lead.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: At level 3 the numbers lean your way — dagger-reset roulettes edge out the soldier-poke shuffle control when both sides play it straight. Press the small advantages: wave position, first poke, cooldown ticks.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Slight edge through levels 4-5: your dagger-reset roulettes beat Azir's soldier-poke shuffle control on the margins. Take the short trades you start — just don't force a coin-flip all-in off a small lead.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Death Lotus online — any 2v2 near your daggers is a blender invoice. The reset engine is armed.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Slight deficit on first item: Azir's soldier-poke shuffle control edge out your dagger-reset roulettes on the margins. You can still trade — just let him start the exchanges and answer on your terms.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: At two-plus items the numbers lean his way — the soldier-poke shuffle control out-tick your dagger-reset roulettes in even exchanges. Don't bleed for pride; take the trades his cooldowns hand you.

phases.why: Late Kata is a chain reaction: enter on daggers, lotus the clump, reset through the wreckage, repeat until silence.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q the wave and collect the dagger — every pickup is a free spin; the lane learns your dagger geometry or bleeds.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: W joins: drop, dance, collect — the self-dagger speeds your trades and your exits both.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Full kit: E to daggers, not faces — the blink economy is the champion; trade only through steel on the ground.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Slight edge through levels 4-5: your dagger-reset roulettes beat Veigar's cage-stack inevitability on the margins. Take the short trades you start — just don't force a coin-flip all-in off a small lead.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Death Lotus online — any 2v2 near your daggers is a blender invoice. The reset engine is armed.
